name: regex-pattern-builder
author: Dexploarer
description: Builds and explains regex patterns from natural language, tests patterns, and provides examples. Use when user asks to "create regex", "regex pattern", "match pattern", "validate email/phone", or "regex help".

name: security-header-generator
author: Dexploarer
description: Generates security HTTP headers (CSP, HSTS, CORS, etc.) for web applications to prevent common attacks. Use when user asks to "add security headers", "setup CSP", "configure CORS", "secure headers", or "HSTS setup".

name: terraform-module-builder
author: Dexploarer
description: Generates reusable Terraform modules with best practices for AWS, Azure, GCP infrastructure as code. Use when user asks to "create Terraform module", "generate IaC module", "setup Terraform", or "create infrastructure module".

name: testing-framework-helper
author: Dexploarer
description: Generates comprehensive test suites with unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests for various frameworks (Jest, Pytest, Vitest, etc.). Use when writing tests.

name: threejs-scene-builder
author: Dexploarer
description: Comprehensive Three.js and React Three Fiber skill for creating 3D scenes, characters, NPCs, procedural generation, animation retargeting, and interactive experiences. Use when user asks to "create Three.js scene", "setup React Three Fiber", "add 3D character", "create NPC AI", "procedural 3D generation", "retarget animation", "setup avatar system", or "create 3D game".

name: todo-finder
author: Dexploarer
description: Finds and organizes TODO, FIXME, HACK, and NOTE comments in codebase. Use when user asks to "find TODOs", "show all FIXMEs", "list action items", or "what needs to be done".

name: translation-key-extractor
author: Dexploarer
description: Extracts hardcoded strings from code and converts them to translation keys for i18n. Use when user asks to "extract translations", "find hardcoded strings", "internationalize code", "setup i18n", or "create translation files".

name: visual-regression-test-setup
author: Dexploarer
description: Sets up visual regression testing using Percy, Chromatic, or Playwright to catch unintended UI changes through screenshot comparison. Use when user asks to "setup visual testing", "add screenshot tests", "prevent visual bugs", or "setup Percy/Chromatic".

name: vue-component-generator
author: Dexploarer
description: Generates Vue 3 components using Composition API, TypeScript, proper props definition, and best practices. Use when creating Vue components or building Vue UI.

name: wcag-compliance-checker
author: Dexploarer
description: Checks websites for WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance, identifies accessibility violations, and provides remediation guidance. Use when user asks to "check accessibility", "wcag compliance", "a11y audit", "accessibility violations", or "screen reader testing".

name: exa
author: Dianel555
description: High-precision semantic search and content retrieval via Exa API. Use when: (1) Deep research requiring semantic understanding, (2) Code documentation and examples lookup, (3) Company/professional research, (4) AI-powered comprehensive research tasks, (5) URL content extraction with structured output. Triggers: "research", "find papers", "code examples", "company info", "LinkedIn profiles", "deep analysis". Differentiator: Exa excels at semantic/neural search while grok-search is better for real-time news and general web content.

name: grok-search
author: Dianel555
description: Enhanced web search and real-time content retrieval via Grok API with forced tool routing. Use when: (1) Web search / information retrieval / fact-checking, (2) Webpage content extraction / URL parsing, (3) Breaking knowledge cutoff limits for current information, (4) Real-time news and technical documentation, (5) Multi-source information aggregation. Triggers: "search for", "find information about", "latest news", "current", "fetch webpage", "get content from URL". IMPORTANT: This skill REPLACES built-in WebSearch/WebFetch with Grok Search tools.
_original_description: Enhanced web search and real-time content retrieval via Grok API with forced tool routing. Use when: (1) Web search / information retrieval / fact-checking, (2) Webpage content extraction / URL parsing, (3) Breaking knowledge cutoff limits for current information, (4) Real-time news and technical documentation, (5) Multi-source information aggregation. Triggers: "search for", "find information about", "latest news", "current", "fetch webpage", "get content from URL". IMPORTANT: This skill REPLACES built-in WebSearch/WebFetch with GrokSearch MCP tools.

name: sequential-think
author: Dianel555
description: Multi-step reasoning engine for complex analysis and systematic problem solving. Use when: (1) Complex debugging scenarios with multiple layers, (2) Architectural analysis and system design, (3) Problems requiring hypothesis testing and validation, (4) Multi-component failure investigation, (5) Performance bottleneck identification. Triggers: "--think", "--think-hard", "--ultrathink", "analyze step by step", "break down this problem", "systematic analysis". IMPORTANT: Do NOT use for simple single-step tasks.

name: serena
author: Dianel555
description: Semantic code understanding with IDE-like symbol operations. Use when: (1) Large codebase analysis (>50 files), (2) Symbol-level operations (find, rename, refactor), (3) Cross-file reference tracking, (4) Project memory and session persistence, (5) Multi-language semantic navigation. Triggers: "find symbol", "rename function", "find references", "symbol overview", "project memory". IMPORTANT: Prioritize Serena's symbolic tools over file-based grep/read for code exploration.

name: time
author: Dianel555
description: Time and timezone utilities for getting current time and converting between timezones. Use when: (1) Getting current time in any timezone, (2) Converting time between different timezones, (3) Working with IANA timezone names, (4) Scheduling across timezones, (5) Time-sensitive operations. Triggers: "what time is it", "current time", "convert time", "timezone", "time in [city]".
_original_description: Time and timezone utilities for getting current time and converting between timezones. Use when: (1) Getting current time in any timezone, (2) Converting time between different timezones, (3) Working with IANA timezone names, (4) Scheduling across timezones, (5) Time-sensitive operations. Triggers: "what time is it", "current time", "convert time", "timezone", "time in [city]". Supports both MCP server and standalone CLI.

name: agent-fungibility
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: The philosophy and practical benefits of agent fungibility in multi-agent software development. Why homogeneous, interchangeable agents outperform specialized role-based systems at scale.

name: agent-mail
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: MCP Agent Mail - Mail-like coordination layer for multi-agent workflows. Identities, inbox/outbox, file reservations, contact policies, threaded messaging, pre-commit guard, Human Overseer, static exports, disaster recovery. Git+SQLite backed. Python/FastMCP.

name: agent-swarm-workflow
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Jeffrey Emanuel's multi-agent implementation workflow using NTM, Agent Mail, Beads, and BV. The execution phase that follows planning and bead creation. Includes exact prompts used.

name: beads-workflow
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Converting markdown plans into beads (tasks with dependencies) and polishing them until they're implementation-ready. The bridge between planning and agent swarm execution. Includes exact prompts used.

name: building-glamorous-tuis
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Build beautiful terminal UIs with Charmbracelet. For SHELL/BASH scripts: use Gum (prompts, spinners, selection), VHS (recording), Mods (AI), Freeze (screenshots), Glow (markdown). For GO applications: use Bubble Tea (framework), Bubbles (components), Lip Gloss (styling), Huh (forms), Glamour (markdown), Harmonica (animation). For INFRASTRUCTURE: Wish (SSH apps), Soft Serve (Git), teatest (testing). Trigger on: shell scripts needing UI, Go CLI tools, terminal dashboards, SSH applications, or "make this CLI prettier."

name: bv
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Beads Viewer - Graph-aware triage engine for Beads projects. Computes PageRank, betweenness, critical path, and cycles. Use --robot-* flags for AI agents.

name: caam
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Coding Agent Account Manager - Sub-100ms account switching for AI coding CLIs with fixed-cost subscriptions. Vault profiles, isolated profiles for parallel sessions, smart rotation with health scoring, cooldown tracking, automatic failover, TUI dashboard. Go CLI.

name: cass
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Coding Agent Session Search - unified CLI/TUI to index and search local coding agent history from Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, Aider, ChatGPT, Pi-Agent, Factory, and more. Purpose-built for AI agent consumption with robot mode.
description_zh: CASS 是一个命令行工具，用于索引和搜索来自 11 种以上 AI 编程助手的历史会话。它提供统一的搜索界面和 JSON 输出，支持跨代理知识检索和调试参考。

name: claude-chrome
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Claude in Chrome - browser automation via the official Anthropic extension. Control your logged-in Chrome browser, automate workflows, fill forms, extract data, and run scheduled tasks.

name: cm
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: CASS Memory System - procedural memory for AI coding agents. Three-layer cognitive architecture with confidence decay, anti-pattern learning, cross-agent knowledge transfer, trauma guard safety system. Bun/TypeScript CLI.

name: complete-rust-development
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: A comprehensive skill for Rust development that combines error handling, testing, and logging patterns. Demonstrates the 'includes' composition feature by merging content from multiple standalone skills.

name: crafting-readme-files
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Craft professional README.md files for GitHub open source projects. Generates hero sections, installation instructions, feature tables, and architecture diagrams. Use when creating or revising a README, documenting a CLI tool, library, or open source project, or when user asks about README structure, badges, or project documentation.

name: creating-share-images
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Create OpenGraph and Twitter share images for Next.js applications using next/og ImageResponse. Generates dynamic social preview cards with gradients, SVG icons, and proper dimensions. Use when building OG images, Twitter cards, social previews, meta images, or share images for webapps.

name: csctf
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Chat Shared Conversation To File - Convert ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, and Claude share links to clean Markdown + HTML transcripts. Preserves code fences with language detection, deterministic filenames, GitHub Pages publishing. Bun-native CLI.

name: cursor
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Control Cursor AI code editor via CLI. Open files, folders, diffs, and manage extensions.

name: dcg
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Destructive Command Guard - High-performance Rust hook for Claude Code that blocks dangerous commands before execution. SIMD-accelerated, modular pack system, whitelist-first architecture. Essential safety layer for agent workflows.

name: de-slopify
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Remove telltale signs of AI-generated 'slop' writing from README files and documentation. Make your docs sound authentically human.

name: error-handling-base
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Foundation for error handling patterns. This is a base skill designed to be extended by language-specific error handling skills.

name: flywheel-discord
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Security rules and behavioral guidelines for operating as Clawdstein in The Agent Flywheel Hub Discord server. This is a PUBLIC community server—apply strict data isolation.

name: gcloud
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Google Cloud Platform CLI - manage GCP resources including Compute Engine, Cloud Run, GKE, Cloud Functions, Storage, BigQuery, and more.

name: ghostty
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Control Ghostty terminal emulator via CLI. Manage windows, tabs, splits, and configuration.

name: giil
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Get Image [from] Internet Link - Zero-setup CLI for downloading full-resolution images from iCloud, Dropbox, Google Photos, and Google Drive share links. Four-tier capture strategy, browser automation, HEIC conversion, album support. Node.js/Playwright.

name: github
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: GitHub CLI - manage repositories, issues, pull requests, actions, releases, and more from the command line.

name: logging-patterns
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Common logging patterns and practices. This skill is designed to be included in composite skills via the 'includes' feature.

name: ntm
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Named Tmux Manager - Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini in tiled tmux panes. Visual dashboards, command palette, context rotation, robot mode API, work assignment, safety system. Go CLI.

name: planning-workflow
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Jeffrey Emanuel's comprehensive markdown planning methodology for software projects. The 85%+ time-on-planning approach that makes agentic coding work at scale. Includes exact prompts used.

name: ru
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Repo Updater - Multi-repo synchronization with AI-assisted review orchestration. Parallel sync, agent-sweep for dirty repos, ntm integration, git plumbing. 17K LOC Bash CLI.

name: rust-error-handling
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Rust-specific error handling patterns, building on the base error handling skill. Demonstrates the 'extends' composition feature.

name: slb
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for destructive commands in multi-agent workflows. Risk-tiered classification, command hash binding, 5 execution gates, client-side execution with environment inheritance. Go CLI.
description_zh: 用于多智能体工作流的Go命令行工具，实现危险命令的双人复核规则。按风险等级分类命令，需要同行审批，在客户端执行并继承环境变量。包含TUI仪表盘、紧急覆盖和Claude Code集成钩子。

name: ssh
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: SSH remote access patterns and utilities. Connect to servers, manage keys, tunnels, and transfers.

name: supabase
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Manage Supabase projects, databases, migrations, Edge Functions, and storage using the `supabase` CLI.

name: tanstack-integration
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Find opportunities to improve web application code using TanStack libraries (Query, Table, Form, Router, etc.). Avoid man-with-hammer syndrome by applying TanStack after vanilla implementation works.

name: testing-patterns
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Common testing patterns and practices. This skill is designed to be included in composite skills via the 'includes' feature.

name: ubs
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Ultimate Bug Scanner - Pre-commit static analysis for AI coding workflows. 18 detection categories, 8 languages, 4-layer analysis engine. The AI agent's quality gate.

name: ui-ux-polish
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Iterative UI/UX polishing workflow for web applications. The exact prompt and methodology for achieving Stripe-level visual polish through multiple passes.

name: vercel
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Deploy and manage Vercel projects, domains, environment variables, and serverless functions using the `vercel` CLI.

name: wezterm
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Control WezTerm terminal emulator via CLI. Manage panes, tabs, workspaces, and execute commands in running terminals.

name: wrangler
author: Dicklesworthstone
description: Deploy and manage Cloudflare Workers, Pages, KV, R2, D1, and other Cloudflare services using the `wrangler` CLI.

name: gh-issue-fix-flow
author: Dimillian
description: End-to-end GitHub issue fix workflow using gh, local code changes, builds/tests, and git push. Use when asked to take an issue number, inspect the issue via gh, implement a fix, run XcodeBuildMCP builds/tests, commit with a closing message, and push.

name: macos-spm-app-packaging
author: Dimillian
description: Scaffold, build, and package SwiftPM-based macOS apps without an Xcode project. Use when you need a from-scratch macOS app layout, SwiftPM targets/resources, a custom .app bundle assembly script, or signing/notarization/appcast steps outside Xcode.

name: swiftui-ui-patterns
author: Dimillian
description: Best practices and example-driven guidance for building SwiftUI views and components. Use when creating or refactoring SwiftUI UI, designing tab architecture with TabView, composing screens, or needing component-specific patterns and examples.

name: cc-devflow-orchestrator
author: Dimon94
description: CC-DevFlow workflow router and agent recommender. Use when starting requirements, running flow commands, or asking about devflow processes.
description_zh: 该技能作为一个复杂开发工作流系统的中央路由器。它根据用户当前项目阶段，引导用户使用特定命令和代理，避免重复详细标准。提供清晰的状态路由、故障排除指南，并与PRD撰写、技术设计、UI原型、代码审查等专业代理集成。
_original_description: This skill acts as a central router for a complex development workflow system. It directs users to specific commands and agents based on their current project phase, preventing duplication of detailed standards. It provides clear state-based routing, troubleshooting guides, and integration with specialized agents for PRD writing, tech design, UI prototyping, and code review.

name: constitution-guardian
author: Dimon94
description: Real-time Constitution compliance checker for devflow documents. Blocks partial implementations and hardcoded secrets during file editing.
description_zh: 一个防护栏技能，在编辑开发流程文档时实时检测并阻止保存包含TODO占位符或硬编码密钥的违规内容。作为PreToolUse钩子运行，在文件保存前检查部分实现标记和安全漏洞，提供具体的行号报告和修复指导。
_original_description: A guardrail skill that blocks file saves when devflow documents contain partial implementation markers or hardcoded secrets. It runs as a PreToolUse hook, checking for TODO/FIXME comments and secret patterns before allowing edits to be saved. Provides clear violation messages with line numbers and links to the full constitution document.

name: ast-grep
author: Dwsy
description: 语法感知的代码搜索、linting 和重写工具。支持基于 AST 的结构化代码搜索和批量代码转换。
description_zh: 一个基于抽象语法树（AST）的语法感知工具，用于代码搜索、检查和大规模重写。它支持精确的结构化代码分析和跨语言的批量转换。

name: context7
author: Dwsy
description: Search GitHub issues, pull requests, and discussions across any repository. Activates when researching external dependencies (whisper.cpp, NAudio), looking for similar bugs, or finding implementation examples.
description_zh: 此Claude技能可搜索GitHub仓库的问题、拉取请求、讨论和代码示例，用于研究解决方案、查找类似错误和发现软件开发中的实现模式。

name: exa
author: Dwsy
description: 使用 Exa.ai API 进行高质量的互联网搜索。需要 EXA_API_KEY 环境变量。
description_zh: 一个使用 Exa.ai API 进行高质量互联网搜索的 Claude 技能。需要设置 EXA_API_KEY 环境变量，并由 pi 代理自动调用执行搜索。

name: improve-skill
author: Dwsy
description: Analyze coding agent session transcripts to improve existing skills or create new ones. Use when asked to improve a skill based on a session, or extract a new skill from session history.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析编码代理会话记录来改进现有技能或创建新技能。它提供提取会话数据和生成技能改进的工作流程和提示。

name: project-planner
author: Dwsy
description: Comprehensive project planning and documentation generator for software projects. Creates structured requirements documents, system design documents, and task breakdown plans with implementation tracking. Use when starting a new project, defining specifications, creating technical designs, or breaking down complex systems into implementable tasks. Supports user story format, acceptance criteria, component design, API specifications, and hierarchical task decomposition with requirement traceability.
description_zh: 为软件项目生成全面的项目规划文档，包括需求、系统设计和任务分解。提供结构化模板和指导，支持需求可追溯性和AI辅助实施。

name: svg-logo-generator
author: Dwsy
description: Generate high-quality, minimalistic, and geometric SVG logos using Python scripts. Use this skill when users need to create logos, icons, or visual identities with geometric primitives (circles, rects, paths) and specific color schemes. Applies generative design principles with standardized workflows for scalable SVG output.
description_zh: 一个基于Python的工具，仅使用标准库生成简约几何风格的SVG徽标。它遵循结构化工作流程，包括设计分析、SVG配置和代码实现，以生成可缩放的矢量图形。

name: system-design
author: Dwsy
description: Use when designing, architecting, or planning a new system from requirements or ideas - transforms concepts into navigable design catalog using EventStorming methodology, Mermaid diagrams, and progressive elaboration through 5 phases (Requirements, Big Picture, Processes, Data/Flows, Integration)
description_zh: 使用EventStorming方法和Mermaid图表，通过五个渐进阶段将系统需求转化为结构化设计目录，从需求收集到集成规划。

name: tavily-search-free
author: Dwsy
description: Web search, online search, real-time search, internet search, Google alternative, Bing alternative, DuckDuckGo alternative, search the web, lookup online, find information, research,查询,搜索,搜索结果,网页搜索,联网搜索,实时搜索,网络查询,资料查找,信息检索,最新资讯,新闻搜索, Tavily Search API for optimized, real-time web search results for RAG. A pre-configured, cost-effective search tool.
description_zh: 该技能集成Tavily搜索API，为LLM和RAG应用提供优化的实时网络搜索结果。它是一个预配置、经济高效的工具，用于获取干净、结构化的搜索数据。
_original_description: Use Tavily Search API for optimized, real-time web search results for RAG. A pre-configured, cost-effective search tool.

name: tmux
author: Dwsy
description: Remote control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs, background tasks, and services.
description_zh: 一个用于管理tmux终端会话的技能，可运行交互式CLI任务、后台进程和长期服务，具有会话持久化、与个人配置隔离以及自动清理功能。
_original_description: Remote control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs, background tasks, and services. Supports sub-tasks, long-running processes, and service management with session persistence and automatic cleanup.

name: web-browser
author: Dwsy
description: Allows to interact with web pages by performing actions such as clicking buttons, filling out forms, and navigating links. It works by remote controlling Google Chrome or Chromium browsers using the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP). When Claude needs to browse the web, it can use this skill to do so.
description_zh: 一个用于自动化网页浏览器交互的技能，包括导航、表单填写、点击、截图和数据提取，适用于测试和抓取任务。
_original_description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

name: workhub
author: Dwsy
description: 工作文档枢纽，强制执行 SSOT（Single Source of Truth）原则，管理 `docs/` 目录下的架构决策、设计文档、Issues（任务规划）、PRs（变更记录）。支持 GitHub 协作开发模式。
description_zh: 一个强制执行单一事实来源原则的文档管理与任务跟踪工具，支持GitHub风格的Issues和PRs工作流，用于管理项目文档。

name: calculator
author: EXboys
description: A simple calculator that can add, subtract, multiply, and divide numbers. Use when the user needs to perform basic arithmetic operations.
description_zh: 一个简单的计算器技能，当提供运算类型和两个数字时，可以执行加法、减法、乘法和除法等基本算术运算。

name: data-analysis
author: EXboys
description: Analyze CSV/JSON data with statistics, filtering, and aggregation. Powered by pandas and numpy.

name: http-request
author: EXboys
description: 发起 HTTP 网络请求，支持 GET、POST、PUT、DELETE、PATCH 方法。当用户需要调用 API、获取网页内容、发送数据到服务器时使用。
description_zh: 一个通用的HTTP网络请求技能，支持GET、POST、PUT、DELETE和PATCH方法，用于调用API、获取网页内容、向服务器发送数据，支持自定义请求头、JSON请求体和超时设置。

name: text-processor
author: EXboys
description: 文本处理工具。支持的操作(operation)：uppercase(大写)、lowercase(小写)、reverse(反转)、trim(去空白)、count(统计)。参数：text(文本)、operation(操作类型)。

name: ghe-changelog
author: Emasoft
description: This skill should be used when updating the project CHANGELOG, tracking requirement changes, recording design decisions, or documenting version history. Uses git-diff to detect and categorize changes to both code and requirements. Trigger on "changelog", "version history", "what changed", or after significant commits.

name: ghe-design
author: Emasoft
description: Reference material for Athena when writing requirements. NOT a template - Athena writes requirements freely based on the domain. This skill provides guidance patterns that may be useful, not constraints to follow.

name: ghe-requirements
author: Emasoft
description: This skill should be used when creating, updating, linking, or versioning requirements for GitHub Elements threads. Use when user mentions requirements, specs, REQ files, or when starting feature development. Provides the requirements folder structure, versioning system, and SERENA backup protocols.
description_zh: 为GitHub Elements项目设计的结构化需求管理系统，强制执行版本控制、与问题链接以及备份协议。提供模板、文件夹组织和验证命令，确保规范与实现之间的可追溯性。
_original_description: A structured requirements management system for GitHub Elements projects that enforces strict versioning, linking to issues, and backup protocols. It provides templates, folder organization, and validation commands to maintain traceability between specs and implementation.

name: device-testing
author: EvanBacon
description: Interact with iOS simulators and verify app behavior using xcobra
description_zh: 该技能提供命令行工具用于与iOS模拟器交互和调试Expo应用。支持通过无障碍树检查UI、点击元素、文本输入、手势模拟以及在运行的应用中执行JavaScript。文档包含测试工作流和常见路由问题的故障排除方法。
_original_description: This skill provides command-line tools for interacting with iOS simulators and debugging Expo apps. It enables UI inspection via accessibility trees, element tapping, text input, gesture simulation, and JavaScript evaluation within running apps. The documentation includes practical workflows for testing and troubleshooting common routing issues.

name: expo-devtools-cli
author: EvanBacon
description: Building Expo DevTools Plugins with CLI Interfaces for interacting with running Expo apps using agents.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建通过WebSocket连接运行中Expo应用的CLI工具模板。包含完整的TypeScript代码，涵盖CLI客户端和React Native钩子，详细说明了DevTools插件系统的通信协议。采用Bun运行时和Stricli框架实现类型安全的CLI开发。
_original_description: This skill provides a template for building CLI tools that connect to running Expo apps via WebSocket. It includes complete TypeScript code for both CLI client and React Native hook, with detailed protocol specifications for the DevTools plugin system. The architecture uses Bun runtime and Stricli framework for type-safe CLI development.

name: expo-modules
author: EvanBacon
description: Building great Expo native modules for iOS and Android. Views, APIs, Marshalling, Shared Objects, Expo Documentation, Verifying Expo modules.
description_zh: 该技能为构建高质量的Expo原生模块提供了详细指南，涵盖API设计模式、视图实现、数据编组、共享对象和生态系统集成，包含具体代码示例和最佳实践。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for building high-quality Expo native modules for iOS and Android. It covers API design patterns, view implementation, marshalling techniques, shared objects, and ecosystem integration with concrete code examples and best practices.

name: healthkit-cli
author: EvanBacon
description: Seed and verify HealthKit data in running Expo apps using the apple-health CLI
description_zh: 一个用于在Expo应用开发过程中填充和验证HealthKit数据的CLI工具。它允许开发者通过NDJSON批量写入模拟的健康指标数据，查询现有样本，并生成统计数据，从而帮助测试应用的健康功能而无需依赖真实设备。
_original_description: A CLI tool for seeding and verifying HealthKit data in Expo apps during development. It lets developers batch-write realistic health metrics via NDJSON, query existing samples, and generate statistics for testing health-related app features without physical devices.

name: brainstorming
author: EveryInc
description: This skill should be used before implementing features, building components, or making changes. It guides exploring user intent, approaches, and design decisions before planning. Triggers on "let's brainstorm", "help me think through", "what should we build", "explore approaches", ambiguous feature requests, or when the user's request has multiple valid interpretations that need clarification.

name: coding-tutor
author: EveryInc
description: Personalized coding tutorials that build on your existing knowledge and use your actual codebase for examples. Creates a persistent learning trail that compounds over time using the power of AI, spaced repetition and quizes.

name: git-worktree
author: EveryInc
description: This skill manages Git worktrees for isolated parallel development. It handles creating, listing, switching, and cleaning up worktrees with a simple interactive interface, following KISS principles.

name: rclone
author: EveryInc
description: Upload, sync, and manage files across cloud storage providers using rclone. Use when uploading files (images, videos, documents) to S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Google Drive, Dropbox, or any S3-compatible storage. Triggers on "upload to S3", "sync to cloud", "rclone", "backup files", "upload video/image to bucket", or requests to transfer files to remote storage.
description_zh: 该技能提供rclone命令，用于在多个云存储提供商之间上传、同步和管理文件。包含安装验证、S3/R2/B2/Google Drive/Dropbox配置指南，以及不同传输场景的实用命令和参数。
_original_description: This skill provides rclone commands for uploading, syncing, and managing files across multiple cloud storage providers. It includes setup verification, configuration guidance for S3, R2, B2, Google Drive, and Dropbox, plus practical commands with flags for different transfer scenarios.

name: skill-one
author: EveryInc
description: Sample skill

name: search-skill
author: GBSOSS
description: Search and recommend Claude Code skills from trusted marketplaces

name: skill-from-github
author: GBSOSS
description: Create skills by learning from high-quality GitHub projects

name: skill-from-masters
author: GBSOSS
description: 通过真实案例创建高质量skill。先找黄金案例和失败案例，归纳什么有效什么无效，再用理论解释为什么。skill是干活的，要从实践中学习，不是从书本中学习。触发词："帮我创建一个skill"、"我想做一个skill来..."
_original_description: Help users create high-quality skills by discovering and incorporating proven methodologies from domain experts. Use this skill BEFORE skill-creator when users want to create a new skill - it enhances skill-creator by first identifying expert frameworks and best practices to incorporate. Triggers on requests like "help me create a skill for X" or "I want to make a skill that does Y". This skill guides methodology selection, then hands off to skill-creator for the actual skill generation.

name: ai-sdk-5
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Vercel AI SDK 5 patterns. Trigger: When building AI chat features - breaking changes from v4.

name: angular-architecture
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Angular architecture: Scope Rule, project structure, file naming, style guide. Trigger: When structuring Angular projects or deciding where to place components.

name: angular-core
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Angular core patterns: standalone components, signals, inject, control flow, zoneless. Trigger: When creating Angular components, using signals, or setting up zoneless.

name: angular-forms
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Angular forms: Signal Forms (experimental) and Reactive Forms. Trigger: When working with forms, validation, or form state in Angular.

name: angular-performance
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Angular performance: NgOptimizedImage, @defer, lazy loading, SSR. Trigger: When optimizing Angular app performance, images, or lazy loading.

name: django-drf
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Django REST Framework patterns. Trigger: When building REST APIs with Django - ViewSets, Serializers, Filters.

name: electron
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Electron patterns for building cross-platform desktop applications. Trigger: When building desktop apps, working with Electron main/renderer processes, IPC communication, or native integrations.

name: elixir-antipatterns
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Core catalog of 8 critical Elixir/Phoenix anti-patterns covering error handling, separation of concerns, Ecto queries, and testing.  Trigger: During Elixir code review, refactoring sessions, or when writing Phoenix/Ecto code.

name: gentleman-bubbletea
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Bubbletea TUI patterns for Gentleman.Dots installer. Trigger: When editing Go files in installer/internal/tui/, working on TUI screens, or adding new UI features.

name: gentleman-e2e
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Docker-based E2E testing patterns for Gentleman.Dots installer. Trigger: When editing files in installer/e2e/, writing E2E tests, or adding platform support.

name: gentleman-installer
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: Installation step patterns for Gentleman.Dots TUI installer. Trigger: When editing installer.go, adding installation steps, or modifying the installation flow.

name: gentleman-system
author: Gentleman-Programming
description: System detection and command execution patterns for Gentleman.Dots. Trigger: When editing files in installer/internal/system/, adding OS support, or modifying command execution.
